cover.title: this week, in real numbers
cover.sub: Our own growth fleet, last 7 days. My run on our repos — not a universal claim. The number I quote publicly stays a conservative ~60%.

cta.title: measure it on your own repo
cta.sub: trovex ships a savings view. Install it, point it at a repo, read your own number.

source: trovex savings dashboard, our own repo
